purpose: Builder-side input bundle for implementing the first Skillfoundry internal opportunity-discovery mechanism.

sources.notes: Primary mechanism brief from the researcher context lineage.
Operator-facing boundary note and usage guidance.

content.body: Implement `bottleneck-radar` as a narrow internal MCP mechanism for technical builders and downstream Skillfoundry agents.
The first release should expose exactly two mechanism tools: `analyze_signals` and `draft_brief`, with structured outputs optimized for quick decision value.
The implementation must be deployable for internal use and remain clearly separated from external pricing, listing, and public launch concerns.
Use the mechanism to produce cleaner opportunity briefs, then hand those briefs into later product, pricing, and launch work.

promotion.notes: Initial build input bundle derived from the first researcher mechanism brief and operator note.
